query:
UPDATE squads
            SET
                name = COALESCE($2, name),
                leader_agent_id = CASE
                    WHEN $3 THEN NULL
                    WHEN $4::uuid IS NOT NULL THEN $4
                    ELSE leader_agent_id
                END,
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE id = $1
            RETURNING
                id                  AS "id!: Uuid",
                project_id          AS "project_id!: Uuid",
                name                AS "name!",
                leader_agent_id,
                created_at          AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>",
                updated_at          AS "updated_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
